name: Liuzhou Iron & Steel Co., Ltd.
summary: Liuzhou Iron & Steel Co., Ltd. produces and sells iron and steel products. The company offers rebars, wires, channels, and ship and boiler plates, as well as round, angle, die, and other steel products. It exports its products to ASEAN countries, Japan, South Korea, and Europe. The company was founded in 1958 and is based in Liuzhou, China.
